description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow consists of four jobs: compilers, linux, mxe64, and mxe32. The compilers job tests compiler compatibility across multiple compilers on ubuntu-20.04. The linux job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-20.04 and ubuntu-18.04. The mxe64 and mxe32 jobs perform cross-compilation for Windows 64-bit and 32-bit using MXE on ubuntu-18.04.
